title: Internal Reporting and Monitoring Platform
summary: End-to-end Python-based reporting platform for enterprise workflow monitoring. It included backend data processing, scheduled report generation, and dashboard visibility to improve reporting transparency and reduce manual monitoring effort.

title: Workflow Automation Dashboard
summary: Developed a full-stack enterprise web application using Python and Dash (Bootstrap) to support workflow visibility, operational coordination, and internal decision support. Also explored Amazon Bedrock and OpenAI models for AI-assisted workflow support concepts. The solution improved workload visibility, reduced manual effort, and provided more timely insight for internal stakeholders.

title: Location Data Management Application
summary: Web-based application developed using Python (Django), React, and PostgreSQL to manage and visualize location-related enterprise data. Built in collaboration with international teams, improving data accuracy and usability.
